---
title: "Montagu Burrows"
---

## Montagu Burrows

**Dates:** (1819-1905)

### Description

historian

### Biography

He was secretary of the Oxford Branch of the Universities Mission to Central Africa, member of the committee which founded Keble College and became  Chichele professor of modern history at Oxford University in 1862. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from March 27th 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
